### `// SYS.INFO`

```python
class Identity:
    def __init__(self):
        self.handle    = "1ces0ul"
        self.os        = "Arch Linux"
        self.wm        = "Rijan (River / Wayland)"
        self.editor    = "Neovim"
        self.shell     = "Bash"
        self.interests = ["Linux", "Wayland", "Self-hosting", "Cloud"]
        self.motto     = "折腾是第一生产力"
```
